title: Saving clause
doc_html:
PART 2. GENERAL TRANSITIONAL PROVISION

§13-201. Saving clause

            Except as provided in Part 3 of this Chapter, a transaction validly entered into before August 1, 2024, and the rights, duties, and interests flowing from the transaction remain valid thereafter and may be terminated, completed, consummated, or enforced as required or permitted by law other than this Title or, if applicable, this Title, as though this Act had not taken effect.

            Acts 2024, No. 773, §1.
doc_text:
PART 2.  GENERAL TRANSITIONAL PROVISION
§13-201.  Saving clause
Except as provided in Part 3 of this Chapter, a transaction validly entered into before
August 1, 2024, and the rights, duties, and interests flowing from the transaction remain valid
thereafter and may be terminated, completed, consummated, or enforced as required or
permitted by law other than this Title or, if applicable, this Title, as though this Act had not
taken effect.
Acts 2024, No. 773, §1.
